steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the choice that best describes the overall structure of the passage. Look for two key moves the passage makes.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'identifies a collection of essays and notes something uncertain about them': The passage introduces The Federalist Papers, then shifts with "Though" to reveal that some authorship is in question. Two-part structure matches exactly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'describes disagreement over the essays' arguments': The passage raises uncertainty about authorship, not about the arguments made. ✗
  • Choice C — 'explains that some essays were co-authored': The passage says authorship of some essays is disputed, not that they were jointly written. ✗
  • Choice D — 'shifts to publication history': The second part of the passage is about authorship uncertainty, not publication history. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
